_publications._publicationTitle: Basement membrane proteins in extracellular matrix characterize NF1 neurofibroma development and response to MEK inhibitor.

_contextSnippet: The mRNA levels of selective BM components, including COL6A1, LAMB1, and NID1, were upregulated in cells with NF1 knockdown
details: mRNA levels of selective BM components including COL6A1, LAMB1, and NID1 were upregulated after NF1 knockdown
